title: diphasiastrum yueshanense
intro: Diphasiastrum yueshanense, also known as the Yueshan fork-leaved fork moss, is a type of plant in the Lycopodiopsida class, belonging to the family Lycopodiaceae. The plant has been traditionally used in Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antipyretic effects. It is believed to have several health benefits, such as reducing fever, alleviating headaches, and promoting blood circulation. In traditional Chinese medicine, Diphasiastrum yueshanense is often prepared as an infusion or decoction, and it can also be used in combination with other herbs to enhance its effects.
